title: Add test coverage for orchestrator/agents.py dispatch functions
description: orchestrator/agents.py has 3 critical dispatch functions (run_single_agent, run_claude_prompt, dispatch_research_agents) with zero dedicated tests. These are the most important functions in the pipeline — they spawn every Claude CLI call. A regression here breaks the entire system.
requirements: Add tests for run_single_agent with mocked subprocess
Add tests for run_claude_prompt with mocked subprocess
Add tests for dispatch_research_agents with mocked agent calls
Test timeout handling and error paths
done_criteria: tests/test_agents.py exists with at least 8 test functions
All tests pass without network access
subprocess.run is mocked in all tests
context: agents.py is the #3 most-modified file (12 touches in 30 days). No test_agents.py exists. Critical coverage gap.
